data.title: Microservices
data.description: Decentralized approach to application functionality, enhancing scalability and flexibility.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Cloud-based execution model where servers, infrastructure, and scaling are managed by a cloud provider.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Reacting to events or messages, often orchestrated via a message broker.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: An entry point for handling API calls and routing them appropriately.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Packaging software into units for consistent, isolated environments across various stages.
